title: The Rescue Side Regroups
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Marines. The central beat is the rescue side regroups.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue side regroups, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Marines shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And Whoa... just look at them run...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AND THAT INCLUDES ALL OF YOU...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You will prove this to the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They're all still captives!! It's no good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dammitall ... We're all going to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What's going to happen to us all?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Well, it looks like we're in trouble!!

summary: The Rescue Side Regroups. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
